# Acutis Flow

**Founded by:** Gerson Nazareth, Derick Dsouza

**What we do:** Help established businesses scale through AI-based technology solutions

---

## Target Audience
- Entrepreneurs and business owners with successful startups or businesses who want to scale but lack technical expertise
- Industry-agnostic - all industries served
- **No startups-from-scratch clients** (99% work with established businesses)

## Services
- Websites, apps, marketing tools
- Technology solutions built using AI-driven coding
- Contractor model - we provide the "how", clients define the "why" and "what"

## Business Model
- Two co-founders, minimal overhead
- Leverage AI for fast, cost-effective development
- Commission-based salespeople for client acquisition
- Ongoing contracts for maintenance and infrastructure

## Non-Negotiables
- No partnerships requiring co-founder status or liability assumption
- No equity partnerships - contractor relationships only
- We build tech, not business strategy
- Exception: May rarely create own products (~1% of work)

## Success Signals
- Paid client acquisition (currently 3 tentative clients)
- Structured pricing model as we grow
- Better software, less time/resources
- Client retention and repeat business
- Expanding service offerings
- Future: potential hardware solutions

---

**Channel use:** Client management, project tracking, coordination

### Medi Guide Platform

**Phase 1: Landing Page** *(current)*
- Simple landing page with WhatsApp CTA
- Christy can share website when networking
- Domain already owned - needs to be hooked up
- Status: Landing page built, pending domain connection

**Phase 2: Provider Database** *(not started)*
- Searchable database of provider services and locations
- Replace disorganized/offline tracking
- Enable quick matching when patients come with requests
- Status: Planning phase, no progress yet

**Approach:** Replace one part at a time - start simple, iterate.

### Live Wise App

**Concept:** QR-based diet guidance app for diabetic patients
- Patient scans QR code in doctor's office
- Simple, low-friction steps to complete
- Patient receives session report
- Doctor gets revenue share, Acutis Flow gets revenue share

**Problem solved:**
- Stops doctor repeating same 20-min diet advice
- Monetizes previously free consultations
- Reduces patient friction (no extra appointment)

**Progress:**
- POC: Created, approved (few months ago)
- MVP: Built, polished, live on subdomain
- Domain: Not yet (Live Wise is working title)
- Status: Awaiting doctor testing

**Blockers:**
- Doctor moving clinics, currently busy
- Plan to nudge starting Monday 2026-03-09
